Name: Nacala Corridor – Copper Cathode Delivery #001 – Kansanshi to Nacala Port, 48.5 MT
Description: Tokenised logistics delivery record for 48.5 metric tons of Grade A copper cathode shipped via Nacala Corridor from Kansanshi Mine (North-Western Province) to Nacala Deep Water Port, Mozambique. Includes bill of lading NCC-2025-0312, weigh-bridge certificate and COMESA chain-of-custody seal.

Name: Nacala Corridor – Maize Delivery #002 – Chipata to FRA Lusaka, 620 MT
Description: Tokenised delivery of 620 metric tons of white maize from Eastern Province smallholder aggregators via the Nacala rail spur to Food Reserve Agency (FRA) Lusaka depot. Includes SAMZ grading certificate Grade 1 and truck manifest NCC-MZ-2025-0402.

Name: Nacala Corridor – Urea Fertiliser Delivery #003 – Nakonde to Eastern Province, 280 MT
Description: Inbound fertiliser delivery: 280 MT urea (46% N) imported from Tanzania via Nakonde border, destined for Eastern Province input distribution centres. COMESA import permit FRT-2025-0287, phytosanitary clearance attached.

Name: Nacala Corridor – Soya Beans Delivery #004 – Serenje to Mpongwe, 450 MT
Description: Export-grade soya beans, 450 MT, from Central Province (Serenje) aggregated by Zambia National Farmers Union members, delivered to Mpongwe crushing plant for processing before export. Includes moisture certificate (10.4%) and fumigation report.

Name: Nacala Corridor – Cobalt Concentrate Delivery #005 – Chambishi to Dar es Salaam, 32 MT
Description: 32 MT cobalt hydroxide concentrate from Chambishi Metals Plc transported via Nacala Corridor to Port of Dar es Salaam for onward export. Grade 38% Co. Chain of custody seal ZCCM-COB-2025-0156. Radiation safety clearance included.

Name: Nacala Corridor – Cotton Bales Delivery #006 – Petauke to Chipata Textile Mill, 185 MT
Description: 185 MT of seed cotton (Grade S1 lint) from Eastern Province cotton outgrowers (Cargill Cotton scheme) transported to Chipata Ginnery. Includes cotton board weight certificate ECB-2025-0411 and moisture content report.

Name: Nacala Corridor – Groundnuts Delivery #007 – Kasama to Lusaka Milling, 380 MT
Description: 380 MT raw groundnuts from Northern Province (Kasama, Mbala districts) aggregated for delivery to Lusaka Milling Company for processing into peanut butter and oil. Grade 1 oil content 48%. ZNFU aggregation certificate NP-GN-2025-0078.

Name: Nacala Corridor – Refined Sugar Delivery #008 – Mazabuka to Nacala Port (Export), 820 MT
Description: 820 MT refined white sugar from Zambia Sugar Plc Nakambala Estate, packed in 50 kg bags, destined for Nacala Port for export to Malawi and Mozambique. Zambia Bureau of Standards quality cert ZBS-SUG-2025-0234. COMESA rules of origin attached.

Name: COMESA Cross-Border Certificate – ZM–MZ Chanida Border – Copper Cathode Export
Description: COMESA Cross-Border Trade Certificate for export of 245 MT copper cathode (Grade A, LME registered) from Zambia to Mozambique via Chanida/Mandimba border post. COMESA Certificate of Origin CO-ZM-2025-0189. Duty-free under COMESA preferential tariff.

Name: COMESA Cross-Border Certificate – ZM–TZ Nakonde Border – Cobalt Concentrate Export
Description: Cross-border trade certificate for 64 MT cobalt hydroxide concentrate from Chambishi Metals, exported to Tanzania via Nakonde/Tunduma border. COMESA CoO CO-ZM-2025-0202. Tanzania import permit TZA-MIN-2025-0078.

Name: COMESA Cross-Border Certificate – ZM–ZW Chirundu OSBP – Steel Imports
Description: Cross-border certificate for 340 MT structural steel (sections, plates, rebar) imported from Zimbabwe via Chirundu One-Stop Border Post for Zambia construction projects. COMESA permit CBT-2025-0445. SABS/SAZ standards certificates attached.

Name: COMESA Cross-Border Certificate – MW–ZM Mchinji Border – Maize Import
Description: Cross-border trade certificate for maize import from Malawi (420 MT, Grade 1) via Mchinji/Mwami border post to address Zambia food security needs. COMESA food trade permit FT-2025-0178. ADMARC (Malawi) export permit and fumigation certificate attached.

Name: COMESA Cross-Border Certificate – ZM–DRC Kasumbalesa – Mining Equipment Import
Description: Cross-border certificate for mining equipment imports from DRC (Katanga Province) via Kasumbalesa border post: 2 articulated haul trucks, 3 pumps, spare parts. COMESA permit CBT-2025-0512. ZEBRA (Zambia Engineering & Builders Registration Authority) inspection certificate.

Name: COMESA Certificate of Origin – Zambia Copper Cathode – COMESA Duty-Free
Description: COMESA Certificate of Origin for 180 MT copper cathode (Grade A, LME-registered) confirming Zambia origin for duty-free entry into COMESA member states. Certificate CO-ZM-2025-0267. Issued by Zambia Revenue Authority on behalf of COMESA.

Name: ZRA Customs Clearance – LKIA – Pharmaceutical Imports – Entry No. ZRA-LKIA-2025-3201
Description: Zambia Revenue Authority customs clearance for pharmaceutical imports via Lusaka Kenneth Kaunda International Airport: vaccines, ARVs and antibiotics consignment from India (Mumbai). Duty paid, ZAMRA import permit attached. Entry No. ZRA-LKIA-2025-3201.

Name: ZRA Customs Clearance – Chirundu OSBP – Consumer Goods Import – Entry No. ZRA-CHI-2025-8502
Description: ZRA customs clearance at Chirundu One-Stop Border Post for consumer goods shipment (clothing, electronics, household items) from South Africa. Customs duty ZMW 680,000 paid. SABS compliance letters and packing list attached. Entry No. ZRA-CHI-2025-8502.

Name: ZRA Customs Clearance – Chanida Border – Copper Cathode Export Declaration
Description: ZRA export customs clearance at Chanida border post for 245 MT copper cathode (Grade A). Export declaration ED-ZRA-2025-0189. Mining royalty payment receipt MR-2025-0091. COMESA rules of origin certificate CO-ZM-2025-0189 verified. LME warrant reference attached.

Name: ZRA Customs Clearance – Nakonde Border – Cobalt Hydroxide Export
Description: ZRA customs and export clearance at Nakonde/Tunduma for cobalt hydroxide concentrate (64 MT, 38% Co). Export declaration ED-ZRA-2025-0202. Radiation safety certificate RSB-2025-0034 from Radiation Protection Authority. Mining royalty receipt MR-2025-0097.

Name: ZRA Customs Clearance – Kazungula Border – Tourism & Hospitality Goods
Description: ZRA clearance at Kazungula Border (Zambia-Botswana) for high-end hospitality and camp supplies: solar equipment, imported food & beverages, luxury furnishings for Livingstone lodge operators. Entry No. ZRA-KAZ-2025-1105.

Name: ZRA Customs Clearance – Livingstone – Safari Equipment Export
Description: ZRA export customs clearance for used safari equipment (game-drive vehicles, camping gear, taxidermy) exported to Zimbabwe via Livingstone Bridge crossing. Entry No. ZRA-LVS-2025-0788. CITES permits and vehicle certificates attached.

Name: Cold Chain Verification – LKIA Airfreight – Roses Export – 1,200 kg
Description: Cold chain integrity verification event for 1,200 kg cut roses from Chisamba flower farms exported via LKIA to Netherlands (Amsterdam Schiphol). Temperature maintained 2–4°C throughout. ZANIS phytosanitary certificate PHY-2025-0344. IoT temperature log verified.

Name: Cold Chain Verification – Chipata Cold Store – Frozen Kapenta to DRC – 3,500 kg
Description: Cold chain event token for 3,500 kg frozen kapenta (Lake Bangweulu harvest) transported from Chipata cold store to Lubumbashi, DRC under controlled temperature (≤−18°C). IoT logger data hash attached. Zambia Bureau of Standards quality certificate ZBS-KAP-2025-0078.

Name: Cold Chain Verification – Chisamba Horticulture – Baby Vegetables to Johannesburg – 800 kg
Description: Cold chain integrity event for 800 kg premium baby vegetables (mange-tout, fine beans, baby corn, baby marrow) packed and pre-cooled at Chisamba pack-house to 4°C, airfreighted via LKIA to O.R. Tambo (JHB) for Woolworths Food SA. IoT continuous temperature log submitted.

Name: Cold Chain Verification – Mazabuka Dairy – Pasteurised Milk & Yoghurt to Kafue – 2,100 kg
Description: Cold chain event for 2,100 kg pasteurised dairy products (full-cream milk, yoghurt, cultured butter) from Mazabuka creamery to Kafue distribution centre. Temperature 2–6°C verified. ZABS dairy quality certificate ZBS-DAIRY-2025-0112. HACCP records hash included.

Name: Cold Chain Verification – Monze Poultry – Dressed Chicken to Lusaka – 4,500 kg
Description: Cold chain integrity event for 4,500 kg dressed broiler chickens from Monze Agri-Livestock processing plant to Lusaka supermarket distribution centres. Temperature ≤4°C maintained throughout 280 km road transport. ZBS food safety certificate ZBS-PTY-2025-0267 and IoT logger hash.
